import { useState } from 'react'; import React from 'react'; import './Cdc.css'; import C1 from '../../Assets/carbide-dead-centers-.webp'; import C2 from '../../Assets/carbide-half-dead-centers.webp'; import C3 from '../../Assets/hobbing-fixture-sleeves-.webp'; const Cdc = () => { const [r1, setR1] = useState(true); const [r2, setR2] = useState(false); const [r3, setR3] = useState(false); const clkHnd1 = () => { setR1(true); setR2(false); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd2 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(true); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd3 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(false); setR3(true); }; return (

Carbide Dead Centers

{r1 &&
Name Detail
Matrial Carbide
Size/Dimension customized
Type MT1, MT2, MT3, MT4, MT5
Usage/Application Industrial Grinding Machines
Country of Origin Made in India

Product Decription

Professionals work hard and in close coordination to provide best range of Carbide Dead Centers. This dead center is accurate in size and superior in finishing. This presented metallic product is easy to install in different machines. This center has excellent finishing and longer life.

Features

  • Different sizest
  • Durable
  • Easy to install
} {r2 &&
Name Detail
Matrial EN31 , D2 , HSS
Shape various
Type CONICAL
Usage/Application Industrial Grinding machines
Country of Origin Made in INDIA
Location Pune

Product Decription

We are keenly engaged in offering reliable Carbide Half Dead Centers. This presented half dead center is reliable and accessible from us in various specifications. Moreover to this, these presented carbide centers are light in weight and supplied to patrons after proper inspection.

Features

  • Rust free
  • Reliable
  • Pressure resistant
} {r3 &&
Name Detail
Matrial H13,THAISON,ORVAR SEPREAM
Head Shape Round
Size Customized
Country of Origin Made in INDIA
Location Pune

Product Decription

We are praised by industrial consumers due to offering best range of Hobbing Fixture Body. This fixture body is superior in finishing and reliable in nature. Moreover to this, these presented fixture bodies are satisfactory in working. Besides this, we apply genuine price for this body and ensure quick delivery.

Features

  • Easy to use
  • Weather proof
  • Pressure resistant
}
) } export default Cdc
